content.tagline: Precision Cutting and Fabrication for Marine Professionals
content.about:
Advanced Waterjet Solutions is Fort Lauderdale's premier provider of precision waterjet and laser cutting services for the marine industry and beyond. Located at 3309 SW 11th Ave in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, we bring cutting-edge technology and over 20 years of expertise to every custom metal fabrication project we take on. Whether you're a boat builder in Broward County or a yacht owner docked along the Intracoastal, we deliver the accuracy and craftsmanship your vessel deserves.

Our facility specializes in custom welding and fabrication work tailored to the demands of marine environments. From structural steel and aluminum welding to precision-cut stainless components and custom fabricated hardware, we handle projects that require tight tolerances and durable results. Our waterjet and laser cutting capabilities allow us to produce complex shapes and parts that traditional fabrication methods simply can't match — with fast turnaround times that keep your build or repair schedule on track.

We serve boat builders, yacht manufacturers, marine repair shops, and vessel owners throughout South Florida who demand unparalleled precision and reliability. Our work extends across the greater Fort Lauderdale area, including Miami-Dade, Palm Beach, and the surrounding coastal communities. When quality matters and deadlines are real, Advanced Waterjet Solutions is the fabrication partner South Florida's marine industry turns to.
content.seoTitle: Advanced Waterjet Solutions | Welding & Fabrication Fort Lauderdale, FL
content.seoDescription: Custom waterjet cutting, welding & metal fabrication for marine industry in Fort Lauderdale, FL. Serving South Florida. Call for fast turnaround.
seoKeywords: stainless steel marine fabrication Fort Lauderdale

serviceDescriptions.Welding & Fabrication: Advanced Waterjet Solutions provides precision welding and custom metal fabrication services for marine vessels, including structural aluminum welding, stainless steel component fabrication, and complex custom parts cut to exact specifications. Using waterjet and laser cutting technology alongside certified welding processes, we produce durable, tight-tolerance components suited for the harsh demands of marine environments. From one-off custom pieces to production runs for boat builders and yacht manufacturers, our fabrication work is built to perform.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Based in Fort Lauderdale, FL, Advanced Waterjet Solutions serves boat owners and marine businesses throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Custom aluminum frame welding and structural repair for powerboats
Stainless steel railing and hardware fabrication for yachts
Precision waterjet-cut deck plates and custom marine components
Fabricated engine mounts and mechanical brackets for marine vessels
Custom transom plates and swim platform metalwork for boat builders
Laser-cut stainless logos and decorative panels for luxury yachts
Structural repair and reinforcement welding on commercial marine vessels
